question: What is the return policy for mobile phone covers?
answer: We have a 7-day return policy, which means you have 7 days after receiving your item to request a return. The item must be in the same condition that you received it, unworn or unused, with tags, and in its original packaging.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: We offer 3-4 days shipping in the metro and maximum 6-7 working days under the tier 2 or tier 3 cities all over India. However, this time may differ in case of natural disasters or other unforeseen circumstances.

question: What is the refund process?
answer: To initiate a return, please contact us at helpdesk.cover@gmail.com. If your return is accepted, we’ll send you a return shipping label, as well as instructions on how and where to send your package. Refunds will be automatically processed within 10 business days after we receive and inspect your return.

question: Can I cancel or change my order?
answer: Please contact us at helpdesk.cover@gmail.com as soon as possible if you need to cancel or make changes to your order. We will do our best to accommodate your request, but please note that we may not be able to make changes once the order has been processed.

question: Is my personal and payment information secure?
answer: Yes, our store is hosted on Shopify Inc. and we use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal and payment information. We also comply with applicable laws and regulations to ensure the security and privacy of your data.
